title: Part 3 – Conversation : un problème de facture
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Hi, I'm calling about invoice number 4521. We haven't received payment yet, and it was due last week. Man: I'm sorry about that. Let me check... it looks like the invoice was sent to our old accounting email address. Woman: That would explain it. Could you give me the correct email address so I can resend it? Man: Of course, it's payments at brightline dot com. Also, could you resend it as a PDF? Our system doesn't accept Word documents. Woman: No problem, I'll send it again right away in the correct format. Man: Thanks. Once we receive it, payment should be processed within five business days.

choices: To ask about a late payment
questions.explanation: Elle appelle car le paiement de la facture n°4521 n'a pas été reçu alors qu'il était dû la semaine précédente.

questions.prompt: What was the problem with the invoice?
choices: It was sent to the wrong email address
questions.explanation: L'homme explique que la facture a été envoyée à l'ancienne adresse e-mail comptable.

questions.prompt: What does the man ask the woman to do?
choices: Resend the invoice as a PDF
questions.explanation: Il demande de renvoyer la facture au format PDF car le système n'accepte pas les fichiers Word.
